title: Add hard cap on maxThemes configuration
body:
## Context

From PR #223 code review (fingerprint: `10dba040daccec6ac474ac8237a0975d`)

## Problem

The `maxThemes` configuration parameter is passed directly to the LLM prompt without an upper bound. A misconfiguration (e.g., `maxThemes: 1000`) could cause excessive LLM output, high token costs, and latency.

## Suggested Improvements

1. Enforce a hard cap (e.g., 50) in `NewExtractor` or `ExtractThemes`
2. Log a warning if configured value exceeds the cap
3. Document the maximum allowed value in config comments

## Priority

Low - edge case misconfiguration; users who set this high probably want it high.

## Related

- PR #223: Theme extraction feature
